$comment: Clean-room notice: SUNCO Compound Router is independently authored; no code, prompts, schemas, or documentation text from compound-engineering-plugin is copied, vendored, or adapted. Phase 54/M6 deliverable. Consumer: packages/cli/references/compound/src/compound-router.mjs. Related design: .planning/router/DESIGN-v1.md §8 Compound-Router.
title: SUNCO Compound Artifact
description: Contract for a single compound artifact generated by the SUNCO post-stage durable-decision consumer. Consumed by compound-router.mjs (validation) and Phase 55 dogfood fixtures (correctness reference). Phase 54 status lifecycle: draft -> proposed -> partially-approved -> approved -> archived.

scope.description: What the compound artifact is about. release = npm publish / git tag event; milestone = milestone closure (e.g., v1.5 done); phase = single phase closure; incident = CI failure recovery or rollback-branch use; ad_hoc = user-invoked without matching triggers.

ref.description: Scope-local identifier. For release: version tag (e.g., v0.12.0). For milestone: milestone id (e.g., M6). For phase: phase id (e.g., 54). For incident: commit-sha-prefix or incident id. For ad_hoc: free-form label.

status.description: Lifecycle. draft: local-only scratch. proposed: auto-written by compound-router at status=proposed; awaits user review of sink proposals. partially-approved: user accepted some sink proposals; others deferred. approved: all sink proposals resolved (accepted or rejected). archived: superseded by a later compound artifact or moved to archive.

source_evidence.description: Paths (relative to repo root) of RouteDecision JSON files consumed for this compound artifact. Empty array allowed for ad_hoc scope where no durable router telemetry was available.

sections.description: The 8 required markdown section names in the rendered artifact. Stable ordering enforced by compound-router.mjs template consumer and Phase 55 fixture oracles.

clean_room_notice.description: Asserts the artifact's rendered markdown contains the verbatim SUNCO clean-room notice. Validator checks the rendered file; this field is a declarative marker.
